suite.name: TestCases

kw.name: Initialize Hil System
kw.doc: Open the serial port and wait for the HIL shell prompt.

test.name: Verify GPIO Input Reads Low When Tied To GND

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: PB2 is wired to GND and must read 0.

test.name: Verify GPIO Input Reads High When Tied To 3V3

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: PB7 is wired to 3.3V and must read 1.

test.name: Verify GPIO Output Drive High

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

test.doc: Drive the on-board LED pin (PC13) high; assert acknowledgement.

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

test.name: Verify PWM Channel 1 Configuration

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

test.doc: Set PWM channel 1 to 1 kHz at 50% duty (500 permille).

test.name: Verify PWM Channel 3 Configuration

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

test.doc: Set PWM channel 3 (now TIM10/PB8) to 2 kHz at 25% duty.

test.name: Verify PWM Rejects Invalid Channel

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Channel 5 is out of range (1-4) and must be rejected.

test.name: Verify SPI1 Master Write Accepted

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

test.doc: Queue a 2-byte SPI master write on channel 1.

test.name: Verify SPI2 Slave Arm Accepted

kw.name: Spi Slave Wait
kw.msg: ${resp} = Queued: SPI2 slave wait 500 ms 'DEADBEEF' (4 bytes)

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

test.doc: Arm SPI2 as slave for a short window; assert acknowledgement.

test.name: Verify UART1 To UART2 Loopback

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Send "HELLO" out USART1 (PA9 TX); assert it arrives on USART2 RX (PA3).

test.name: Verify UART2 To UART1 Loopback

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Send "WORLD" out USART2 (PA2 TX); assert it arrives on USART1 RX (PA10).

test.name: Verify UART Rejects Invalid Channel

kw.name: Uart Send Data
kw.msg: ${resp} = Error: Invalid UART channel '3'. Must be 1 or 2.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Channel 3 is out of range (1-2) and must be rejected.

suite.doc:
Automated Hardware-in-the-Loop Validation Suite for STM32 Blackpill. Uses the Zephyr Shell protocol: ctrl <command> [args...]
Wiring assumed by this suite: * PB2 -> GND (reads 0) * PB7 -> 3.3V (reads 1) * SPI1 (PB3/PB4/PB5) <-> SPI2 (PB13/PB14/PB15) loopback * USART1 <-> USART2 crossover: PA9 (TX1) -> PA3 (RX2) and PA2 (TX2) -> PA10 (RX1)
Firmware currently implements: gpio_set, gpio_get, pwm_set, spi_write, spi_slave_wait, uart_send. ADC shell commands are not yet implemented, so that suite is intentionally absent.
